gates.name: calibration
warnings: pilot_fixture_below_100_record_empirical_calibration_target

gates.name: security
warnings: benign_review_rate_nonzero_operator_cost
lexical_fixed_corpus_is_not_a_production_security_boundary

gates.name: runtime
warnings: receipt_hash_chain_is_not_a_signature_or_multi_writer_lock

gates.name: memory_feedback_lifecycle_hygiene
warnings: memory feedback is selectively observed diagnostic data, not epistemic ground truth

limitations: The calibration fixture is a pilot regression set, not a population-level reliability estimate.
The lexical security corpus does not establish robustness to unseen or semantic attacks.
Receipt hashes detect accidental mutation but provide neither signatures nor multi-writer serialization.
Injected structural, OKF, and unit-test results are trusted as caller-provided observations.
No live network adapter, credential broker, external executor, or publication path is certified.
Memory feedback is selection-biased diagnostic data; the fixed fixture and hygiene report do not certify production memory quality.
scope: deterministic local control-plane, injected repository validators, and fixed regression fixtures, pinned memory-feedback lifecycle fixture, and fixed-time hygiene observation
